name: Dr. Rajesh Sharma
title: Senior Sanskrit Scholar & Vedic Studies Expert
bio: Dr. Rajesh Sharma is a distinguished Sanskrit scholar with over 20 years of experience in Vedic studies. He holds a Ph.D. in Sanskrit from Banaras Hindu University and has authored several books on ancient Indian philosophy. His expertise spans across Vedas, Upanishads, and classical Sanskrit literature.
qualifications: Ph.D. in Sanskrit - Banaras Hindu University
M.A. in Sanskrit Literature - Delhi University
Certificate in Vedic Studies - Kashi Vidyapeeth

name: Prof. Sita Devi
title: Professor of Indian Philosophy & Yoga Studies
bio: Prof. Sita Devi is a renowned expert in Indian philosophy and yoga studies. With a Ph.D. in Philosophy from JNU, she has dedicated her life to teaching and researching ancient Indian wisdom traditions. She specializes in Samkhya, Yoga, and Vedanta philosophies.
qualifications: Ph.D. in Philosophy - Jawaharlal Nehru University
M.A. in Indian Philosophy - University of Delhi
Advanced Yoga Teacher Training - Bihar School of Yoga

name: Acharya Krishna Das
title: Traditional Sanskrit Scholar & Vedic Teacher
bio: Acharya Krishna Das is a traditional Sanskrit scholar who has studied under renowned gurus in Varanasi. He brings the authentic traditional approach to Sanskrit learning, focusing on proper pronunciation, chanting, and understanding of sacred texts.
qualifications: Acharya in Sanskrit - Sampurnanand Sanskrit University

name: Dr. Priya Nair
title: Expert in Sanskrit Literature & Classical Studies
bio: Dr. Priya Nair is a distinguished scholar specializing in classical Sanskrit literature. She has extensive experience in teaching Sanskrit poetry, drama, and prose to students of all levels. Her research focuses on classical Sanskrit aesthetics and literary theory.
qualifications: Ph.D. in Sanskrit Literature - University of Mumbai
Certificate in Classical Sanskrit - Sanskrit College

name: Swami Vedanta Saraswati
title: Spiritual Teacher & Vedanta Scholar
bio: Swami Vedanta Saraswati is a spiritual teacher and Vedanta scholar who has dedicated his life to the study and teaching of Advaita Vedanta. He combines traditional wisdom with modern teaching methods to make ancient knowledge accessible to contemporary students.
